candidates.row_label: Depreciatione/amorisation of property, plant and equipment and intangible fixed assets
candidates.why: Separate operating D&A summary line, but not specifically tied to Commodities / cost of sales. Using it for COGS would risk misallocating total operating D&A to COGS.
Minor D&A line, but appears to be a component/alternate-year detail rather than a COGS-specific D&A row.
D&A component line, but not identified as COGS-related and sits under the broader operating D&A area.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Property, plant and equipment
candidates.why: D&A component line, but not identified as belonging to Commodities / cost of sales.

variables.notes: Selected COGS bucket is only 'Commodities'. The excerpt shows no explicit COGS-specific depreciation/amortisation row (e.g., 'in COGS' or 'cost of sales depreciation'). The visible D&A rows appear to be separate total operating D&A / component disclosures rather than COGS-tagged amounts. Conservatively leave COGS_DA empty to avoid misallocation and double counting.

candidates.row_label: Depreciatione/amorisation of property, plant and equipment and intangible fixed assets
candidates.why: Best summary D&A row above operating profit. It sits as a separate operating expense line alongside Staff costs and Other expenses, so it appears outside the selected XSGA_COMPONENTS bucket and should be added separately. Prefer this summary over component D&A rows to avoid double counting.
Looks like a component of the broader D&A summary line, so not preferred when the summary exists.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Property, plant and equipment
candidates.why: Looks like a component of the broader D&A summary line, so not preferred when the summary exists.
Likely another component/detail line for some years, not preferred over the summary row.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Expenses brought forward for software
candidates.why: Amortisation detail line likely included within the broader D&A disclosure; do not select alongside the summary.

final_choice.row_label: Depreciatione/amorisation of property, plant and equipment and intangible fixed assets

variables.notes: Selected XSGA_COMPONENTS bucket is 'Staff costs' plus 'Other expenses'/'other expenses'. The D&A summary appears as its own operating line item at the same level, not as a subcomponent nested within those selected rows. Therefore it should be added separately later. Component D&A rows are not selected because the summary row is present and avoids double counting. XRD is empty, so no special R&D exclusion applies.
